title: Velvet Poinsettia Flower Picks 6pcs Deep Red Christmas Floral Picks 12-Inch for Christmas Tree Wreath Garland Decorations
features: Velvet Poinsettia Flower Picks. Soft, high-quality velvet fabric for a rich and festive look with golden stamen centers for a touch of glamour.
Christmas Floral Picks. Each petal is delicately edged with cream-white braid trim delicately intertwined with shimmering gold thread for a luxurious and sophisticate effect.
Deep Red Christmas Flower Decorations. Rich deep red petals for a warm, and classic Christmas vibe.
Easy to re-arrange these Christmas poinsettia petals as you want with an flexible iron wire on the reverse side.
Set of 6 Deep Red Christmas Flower picks measure 9-Inch in diameter. Stem length: 8-Inch. For DECORATIVE USE ONLY.
